seo.title: About AInspiration | AI Solutions for SMEs
seo.description: Discover AInspiration, our mission to democratise AI for SMEs, our approach and our history.

pageSubtitle: Our mission: making AI accessible and effective for all businesses

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: At AInspiration, we believe that Artificial Intelligence is an essential growth driver for businesses of all sizes. Our mission is to democratise access to AI by offering innovative, accessible and tailored solutions that meet the specific needs of SMEs.
mission.p2: We support our clients in their digital transformation by offering not only cutting-edge technological tools, but also the expertise and support needed to integrate them effectively into their daily operations. Our goal is to create a measurable positive impact on their productivity, profitability and competitiveness.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.pillar1_desc: Our team combines solid artificial intelligence training with on-the-ground knowledge of the realities faced by SMEs. We don't theorise — we deploy solutions that work.
approach.pillar2_desc: Every project begins with a precise analysis of your processes. We measure the real impact: time saved, errors avoided, costs reduced. ROI is always at the heart of our approach.
approach.pillar3_desc: Technology alone is not enough. We train your teams, adapt solutions to your company culture and remain available in the long term to ensure genuine adoption.

values.title: Our Values
values.val1_desc: We believe that AI should be accessible to all businesses, regardless of their size.
values.val2_desc: We develop ethical solutions and are transparent about our practices.
values.val3_desc: Our technologies aim to enhance human capabilities, not replace them.
values.val4_desc: We strive for excellence in every solution we offer our clients.

history.title: Our History
history.m2019_desc: The company was established with the mission of democratising AI for SMEs.
history.m2020_desc: Development of automation and data analysis solutions.
history.m2021_desc: Introduction of virtual assistants and generative AI services.
history.m2022_desc: Opening to French-speaking European markets: Belgium, Luxembourg and Switzerland.
history.m2023_desc: Launch of our PromptMaster platform and integration of GPT and Claude models into our solutions.
history.m2024_desc: Deployment of our AI-powered CRM solution and automation of complex business workflows.
history.m2025_desc: Launch of autonomous AI agents and tailor-made predictive analytics solutions for every sector.
history.m2026_desc: Rebranding as AInspiration. Unified AI platform for SMEs with 360° support and certified training.
